description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Set up monthly AutoPay on your water account so bills are paid on the 7th of each month from a checking bank account, with a maximum payment cap of $120.

tasks.instruction: In your water usage history, show usage by month for 2023 and open the detailed daily breakdown for the month with the highest total water usage.

tasks.instruction: Submit an online request to start new single-family residential water service at the specified address on April 15, 2026, selecting the lowest-cost eligible deposit option for an owner-occupied residence.

target_names: Residential Single Family - Owner Value Deposit

tasks.instruction: File an online report for a water leak bubbling up from pavement in the street near a specific address, choosing a street/roadway leak location, a matching bubbling leak description, and a high severity level, then submit your contact details.

expected_values.text_description: Water is bubbling up through a crack in the street near the middle of the block.

tasks.instruction: From the residential water conservation rebate programs, enroll in the two active options with the highest rebate amounts that are at least $25 each, so their combined potential rebates are at least $75.
tasks.name: From the residential water conservation rebate programs, enroll in the two active options with the highest rebate amounts that are at least $25 each, so their combined potential rebates are at least $75.

tasks.instruction: Update your account communication settings so you receive only text/SMS alerts for service outages and billing reminders, with all email, general updates, and marketing messages turned off.

tasks.instruction: Use the bill estimator to compare the available residential rate plans for a monthly usage of 6,000 gallons and select the plan with the lower estimated monthly bill as your active plan starting next billing cycle.

tasks.instruction: Schedule a one-time $65 payment toward your water bill to process on April 15, 2026 using your saved Visa card ending in 4242.

target_names: Scheduled one-time payment of $65.00 via Visa ending in 4242 on 2026-04-15

tasks.instruction: Find the earliest upcoming free in-person workshop happening within the next 30 days and within 10 miles of ZIP code 94110, then register two attendees for it using the provided names and contact email.
